title: Improve Navbar logo/wordmark visual design and layout

requirements.summary: Redesign the 'RK Industrial Park' logo/wordmark area in the navbar for stronger visual impact and hierarchy, ensuring single-line display, bold typography with tracked uppercase, proper vertical alignment, and color contrast between 'RK' and 'INDUSTRIAL PARK'
acceptanceCriteria: The 'RK Industrial Park' brand name in the navbar displays on a single line with no text wrapping
The wordmark uses bold, tracked uppercase typography consistent with the Inter design system
The logo icon and wordmark are vertically centred and visually balanced
A colour or weight contrast is applied between 'RK' and 'INDUSTRIAL PARK' (or the full name uses a unified strong treatment) to create brand hierarchy
The navbar brand lockup does not overflow or clip on desktop viewports
On mobile, the brand name remains legible and fits within the hamburger-menu collapsed navbar header

file_operations.description: Refactor the brand lockup to prevent text wrapping by ensuring 'RK INDUSTRIAL PARK' displays on a single line. Increase font size and apply bold weight with letter-spacing (tracking) for uppercase typography using Inter font family. Apply color contrast by styling 'RK' with the industrial blue accent (#1D4ED8 or ind-blue-600) and 'INDUSTRIAL PARK' with white or a contrasting treatment. Ensure the logo icon (building/factory SVG) is properly sized and vertically aligned with the wordmark using flexbox alignment (items-center). Maintain existing sticky/fixed navbar scroll behavior and preserve all navigation links and 'Book Site Visit' CTA button. On mobile, ensure the brand lockup remains legible within the hamburger-menu collapsed state without overflow or clipping.
